ValidationRule.description: Research section should be editable only by Jeremy Scott
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR(
AND( NOT(ISNEW()), RecordType.DeveloperName ='Investor_Solution', $User.Id <> OwnerId ,
OR( ISCHANGED ( Start_project_date__c ), ISCHANGED ( End_project_date__c ), ISCHANGED ( Link_to_Proposal__c ), ISCHANGED ( List_price__c ), ISCHANGED ( Invoiced_Price__c ) ) ),
AND( ISNEW(), RecordType.DeveloperName ='Investor_Solution',
OR( NOT(ISBLANK(Start_project_date__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(End_project_date__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Link_to_Proposal__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(List_price__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Invoiced_Price__c)) )
)
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You're not allowed to edit the Research section.
